summary:
Recovery: Good

Reading: Nothing's flagging today — your knees, joints, shoulders, neck, all your usual watch spots are quiet, so there's no reason to baby anything. You're wired to make progress through steady, repeatable effort rather than dramatic days, and this morning fits you well: you slept a little longer than usual and came back calm and even, which is exactly how your body likes to rebuild.

Performance: Train normally. You came in a touch above your usual line, so it's a solid day to do real work — and with the day only half done, make it resistance work, not just more walking.

Transit: none

nutrition_nudge: Add carbs at lunch — aim for 60g of slow carbs like rice or oats to dodge the afternoon crash.
